subject: GRB 100319A: correction to GCN 10527
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <gcncirc@observ.inetcomm.ru>
body:
Vladimir Lipunov

I am sorry for mistakes in GCN 10527.
The Title: GRB 100319A: MASTER-Net  optical alert observations

Result:

There is no OT on the first 20-s  exposition time image inside 
Swift XRT error box (Gelbord et al., GCN CIRC 10526) brighter 16.0.





The message may be cited.

mailto: lipunov@sai.msu.ru
